verdict: A rhythmic and well-aligned chart that is highly playable but suffers from severe pattern repetition in the climax and a couple of awkward transitions.

issues.problem: The 4-note pattern 'JUMP LR -> U -> D -> L' is repeated 8 times consecutively. While it matches the synth loop, repeating the exact same physical movement so many times feels lazy, monotonous, and causes undue fatigue on the right foot.

Tapping U -> D -> L at 16th-note speed (0.136s intervals) right after a jump creates an uncomfortable transition, forcing either an awkward crossover or a very rapid, double-step on the left foot from D to L.

Tapping U at 68.725 while holding D until 68.862 is an awkward timing window. Releasing the hold a mere 16th-note after tapping with the other foot feels clunky and often leads to premature release errors.
